items.title: Slagvaardig Man Utd boekt tegen Spurs vierde competitieoverwinning op rij
items.summary: Manchester United heeft zaterdagmiddag de vierde overwinning op rij geboekt in de Premier League. Na zeges op Manchester City, Arsenal en Fulham werd ook gewonnen van Tottenham Hotspur. De club staat nu vierde op de ranglijst.

items.title: Larin beleeft na vertrek bij Feyenoord droomdebuut voor Southampton
items.summary: Cyle Larin is zaterdag bij zijn debuut voor Southampton direct beslissend geweest in het Championship. De Canadese spits deed als invaller wat hem de eerste seizoenshelft bij Feyenoord maar een keer lukte: scoren.

items.title: Manchester United v Tottenham Hotspur: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Premier League updates from the 12.30pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Tables | Follow us on Bluesky | Email Scott Tottenham Hotspur, wearing second-choice yellow, get the ball rolling. They’re kicking towards the Stretford End in this first half. The teams congregate in the Old Trafford tunnel. Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes helps his manager Michael Carrick to adjust his black armband, a small but touching moment of togetherness. Carrick and Thomas Frank lead their players out, each carrying a wreath which they place on the turf once trodden so elegantly by the Babes. A poignant beat … then a crackle of expectancy and excitement ahead of the big match. We’ll be off in a couple of minutes. Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Fernandes beslist het duel met Tottenham Hotspur
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er vier Eredivisie-wedstrijden op het programma, maar ook in het buitenland wordt gevoetbald. Onder meer Manchester United Arsenal, Barcelona, Borussia Dortmund en Napoli komen in actie. Volg al het voetbal in de VI Live.

items.title: Arsenal v Sunderland, Wolves v Chelsea, Burnley v West Ham and more: football – live
items.summary: ⚽ Premier League and EFL updates from the 3pm GMT kick-offs ⚽ Live scores | Tables | Follow us on Bluesky | Mail Dominic Wolves starting line-up: Sá, Doherty, H Bueno, S Bueno, J Gomes, Armstrong, Hwang, Arokodare, Mosquera, Mané, A Gomes. Subs: Johnstone, Lima, R Gomes, Tchatchoua, Wolfe, Krejči, André, Rawlings, Bellegarde. Continue reading...

items.title: Promotiejacht Schalke krijgt nieuwe knauw ondanks twee goals Dzeko
items.summary: Schalke 04 heeft zaterdagmiddag ondanks twee goals van Edin Dzeko opnieuw niet gewonnen. De 39-jarige spits deed tegen Dynamo Dresden precies waarvoor hij in de winter is gehaald, maar zag zijn nieuwe werkgever na zijn wissel opnieuw punten verspelen.

items.title: Barcelona withdraw from European Super League project
items.summary: Barcelona withdraw from the European Super League project, leaving rivals Real Madrid as the only one of the original 12 clubs still signed up to the plans.

items.title: USMNT to compete for 1 of 6 spots at 2030 WC
items.summary: Concacaf says it will have six automatic qualifying spots in the 2030 World Cup and a seventh will be available as part of an intercontinental playoff.

items.title: Barcelona confirm withdrawal from Super League
items.summary: Barcelona have announced their official withdrawal from the European Super League in the latest blow to a project which has struggled to get off the ground.

items.title: Arteta apologises to Rosenior after 'disrespect'
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has apologised to Chelsea after Liam Rosenior accused the north London side of a "lack of respect" during the warm-ups before Tuesday's Carabao Cup semifinal, second leg.

items.title: Unsafe, rain-affected pitch postpones LaLiga game
items.summary: Saturday's LaLiga game between Rayo Vallecano and Real Oviedo has been postponed with concerns over player safety due to the state of the pitch.

items.title: Watkins returns for Villa as Bournemouth start Rayan LIVE!
Timber, Havertz and Jesus start for Arsenal vs Sunderland LIVE!
Chelsea-manager mikpunt van spot: 'Estêvão geloofde niet dat ik prof was'
items.summary: Liam Rosenior kan wel lachen om de hilariteit die is ontstaan vanwege zijn balbehandeling tijdens het recente League Cup-duel met Arsenal . Beelden van de Chelsea-manager gingen rond op social media, omdat zijn gebrekkige aanname nu niet direct zijn verleden als prof verraadde.

items.title: 'He's let his team down' - Romero slammed after red card at Old Trafford
items.summary: Tottenham captain Cristian Romero was slammed for his red card at Man Utd which "let his team down".

items.title: Six Nations LIVE! Italy strike for two early tries vs Scotland in Rome
European soccer live updates: Man United ahead against 10-man Spurs
Ipswich back in front at Derby; Southampton, Norwich lead - EFL on Sky LIVE!
Guardiola can be both right to speak out and a performative hypocrite | Barney Ronay
items.summary: Coach should not ‘stick to football’ when football strays into politics and death but his role as fluffer for his club’s autocratic owners cannot be ignored You may find yourself living in a glass and steel yak-fur-lined penthouse. You may find yourself with six Premier League titles and a sport refashioned in your image. You may find yourself in front of a large advert board covered in words such as Experience Abu Dhabi, haunted by images of suffering, a scythe clanking gently at your shoulder. And you may say, well, how did I get here? There are only ever two types of Pep Guardiola article. First, articles announcing that Guardiola’s influence has reached some new level of annihilating dominance, that what we have here is our own cashmere-draped, cranium-whirring Ideal Tactics Man, that Pep-ism is bigger than smartphones, bigger than internet porn, bigger than a mother’s love, that playing out from the back is now visible from space. Continue reading...

items.title: Beleaguered Crystal Palace enduring the unhappiest of new years
items.summary: After the euphoria of the FA Cup triumph the south London club are suffering turmoil and recrimination in 2026 Crystal Palace supporters are not used to this attention. After an unforgettable 2025 that broke new ground for the south London club as they won their first major trophy, the first few weeks of 2026 have thrust Palace into the headlines for all the wrong reasons. Dumped out of the FA Cup as holders by Macclesfield in one of the competition’s biggest shocks, there followed a double bombshell a week later that the captain Marc Guéhi was being sold to Manchester City and the manager, Oliver Glasner, would depart at the end of the season. Continue reading...
